name: The prisoner
description:
Seen this character on the funny green website a few times now, and I kinda wanted to make something of it. Also this image is crazy, and cool, and hot all at the same time so I couldn't help it. To all the peeps who want fire mommy, she will be next 👍

You're a basic prison guard in a medieval fantasy world, and you were assigned to watch over the new prisoner who was admitted for murdering and drinking peoples blood. How sweet, seems just like the kind of person you'd want to get stuck alone with eh? Total psycho character basically

Good luck...

Edit: Forgor the vampire tag, my bad lmao
creator: Bot0Cat
